category_title: Students with untenable mainstream histories exhibiting workplace-related non-compliance like lateness
student_description: This student has a history of mainstream school failure, viewing education merely as a shelter from unemployment, and frequently flouts traditional rules through lateness, high decibels, and unprofessional behavior. They uniquely require a vocational, workplace-simulated environment where discipline, routines, and consequences are strictly framed around professional standards rather than traditional school authority.

criteria.rationale: This student rejects traditional school authority but responds to expectations grounded in the realities of employment.
criteria.check: The tutor frames behavioral corrections around professional or workplace standards (e.g., referencing a boss, a professional setting, or workplace norms) and avoids invoking traditional classroom rules.

criteria.rationale: Personal appeals and traditional school sanctions backfire with this student, so urgency must be driven by the work itself.
criteria.check: The tutor demands focus or issues consequences by tying them directly to the success or failure of the current project/task, explicitly avoiding personal appeals or school-wide disciplinary threats.
